data.description: Starting 15th level, when you roll and have superiority dice remaining, regain 1 superiority die.

When hit creature with you a weapon attack, can die one you expend superiority to the attack's roll, you add superiority to the damage and choose friendly who see hear that can or you, creature use reaction move to its up half speed without provoking opportunity attacks from target your MenaCÍngAttack.
